requirement_topic.en: EMC — VCCI Class B Registration (Consumer / Residential ITE)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——VCCI B类注册（消费类/住宅用信息技术设备）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——VCCI B類登錄（消費類/住宅用資訊技術設備）

summary.en: VCCI (Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment) is Japan's industry body that administers EMC conformity requirements for information technology equipment (ITE). Class B applies to equipment intended for use in residential environments, including consumer IoT, Wi-Fi routers, smart speakers, and connected home devices. Membership of VCCI and registration of the product with VCCI is required before the VCCI conformity mark may be displayed. Testing must be performed against VCCI technical requirements (harmonised with CISPR 32 / VCCI-CISPR 32) at an accredited laboratory. Although VCCI participation is described as voluntary, carrying the VCCI mark is the established market expectation for ITE sold in Japan; major Japanese retailers and distributors routinely require it, making registration effectively mandatory for commercial access. The VCCI Class B mark must be displayed on the product or in the user manual.
summary.zh: VCCI（信息技术设备干扰自主管理协议会）是日本负责管理信息技术设备（ITE）电磁兼容合规要求的行业机构。B类适用于住宅环境中使用的设备，包括消费类物联网设备、Wi-Fi路由器、智能音箱及联网家居设备。在产品标注VCCI符合性标志前，须成为VCCI会员并完成产品注册。须在认可实验室依据VCCI技术要求（与CISPR 32/VCCI-CISPR 32协调一致）进行测试。虽然VCCI参与在形式上属自愿性质，但在日本销售的信息技术设备标注VCCI标志已成市场惯例；日本主要零售商和经销商通常将其列为进货要求，实际上使注册成为商业准入的必要条件。VCCI B类标志须显示于产品或用户手册上。
summary.zht: VCCI（資訊技術設備干擾自主管理協議會）是日本負責管理資訊技術設備（ITE）電磁相容合規要求的行業機構。B類適用於住宅環境中使用的設備，包括消費類物聯網設備、Wi-Fi路由器、智慧喇叭及聯網家居設備。在產品標注VCCI符合性標誌前，須成為VCCI會員並完成產品登錄。須在認可實驗室依據VCCI技術要求（與CISPR 32/VCCI-CISPR 32協調一致）進行測試。雖然VCCI參與在形式上屬自願性質，但在日本銷售的資訊技術設備標注VCCI標誌已成市場慣例；日本主要零售商和經銷商通常將其列為進貨要求，實際上使登錄成為商業准入的必要條件。VCCI B類標誌須顯示於產品或使用者手冊上。

standards_or_laws: VCCI Technical Requirements for ITE (harmonised with CISPR 32 / VCCI-CISPR 32, Class B limits)
VCCI Council Rules — membership and product registration requirements (VCCI, Japan)
CISPR 32:2015 (and amendments) — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emission requirements

summary.en: In China, ITE is subject to mandatory EMC conformity under GB/T 9254 (EMC emission limits for ITE, harmonised with CISPR 22 / CISPR 32), which applies to Class B devices for residential use. Testing must be conducted at a CNAS-accredited laboratory. EMC is also assessed as part of China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for applicable product categories under the GB 4943 / GB 62368 family. China's GB/T 9254 and CCC documentation are not recognised by VCCI and provide no equivalence for Japan market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术设备须依据GB/T 9254（信息技术设备电磁辐射限值，与CISPR 22/CISPR 32协调一致）承担强制电磁兼容合规义务，适用于住宅用B类设备。测试须在CNAS认可实验室进行。电磁兼容也作为相关产品类别中国强制认证（CCC）的组成部分，依据GB 4943/GB 62368系列标准进行评估。中国GB/T 9254文件及CCC认证不被VCCI认可，对日本市场准入不具等效性。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術設備須依據GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備電磁輻射限值，與CISPR 22/CISPR 32協調一致）承擔強制電磁相容合規義務，適用於住宅用B類設備。測試須在CNAS認可實驗室進行。電磁相容也作為相關產品類別中國強制認證（CCC）的組成部分，依據GB 4943/GB 62368系列標準進行評估。中國GB/T 9254文件及CCC認證不被VCCI承認，對日本市場准入不具等效性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Electromagnetic disturbance limits and measurement methods for ITE (harmonised with CISPR 22/32, China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — EMC assessment as part of CCC for applicable ITE categories (CNCA/SAMR)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility, limits for harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2 equivalent, China)

gap.en: China's GB/T 9254 EMC documentation and CCC certification are not recognised by VCCI; separate VCCI membership, product testing to VCCI-CISPR 32 Class B limits, and VCCI product registration are required before the VCCI mark can be displayed on devices sold in Japan. While VCCI participation is formally voluntary, Japanese market access for consumer ITE in practice requires VCCI Class B registration. The VCCI Class B mark requirement and mandatory user-manual notice differ from CN CCC label requirements. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Japan cannot rely on existing CCC EMC test reports for VCCI registration.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254电磁兼容文件及CCC认证不被VCCI认可；须另行加入VCCI、依据VCCI-CISPR 32 B类限值进行产品测试并完成VCCI产品注册，方可在日本销售设备上标注VCCI标志。虽然VCCI参与在形式上属自愿性质，但消费类信息技术设备实际进入日本市场须取得VCCI B类注册。VCCI B类标志要求及强制性用户手册告知要求与中国CCC标签要求不同。中国出口商不得以现有CCC电磁兼容测试报告替代VCCI注册。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254電磁相容文件及CCC認證不被VCCI承認；須另行加入VCCI、依據VCCI-CISPR 32 B類限值進行產品測試並完成VCCI產品登錄，方可在日本銷售設備上標注VCCI標誌。雖然VCCI參與在形式上屬自願性質，但消費類資訊技術設備實際進入日本市場須取得VCCI B類登錄。VCCI B類標誌要求及強制性使用者手冊告知要求與中國CCC標籤要求不同。中國出口商不得以現有CCC電磁相容測試報告替代VCCI登錄。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary registration; market-standard requirement for consumer ITE sold in Japan — VCCI Class B mark required in practice by major distributors and retailers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 EMC conformity required for ITE sold in China; EMC assessed as part of CCC for applicable categories

source.publisher: Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment (VCCI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] VCCI Class B registration is the market-standard EMC requirement for consumer ITE sold in Japan. China GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC documentation cannot be used for VCCI registration. Manufacturers must join VCCI, test to VCCI-CISPR 32 Class B limits at an accredited laboratory, and register the product with VCCI before displaying the VCCI mark. Failure to carry the VCCI mark will typically prevent access to Japan's mainstream retail and distribution channels.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] VCCI B类注册是在日本销售的消费类信息技术设备的市场标准电磁兼容要求。中国GB/T 9254测试报告及CCC电磁兼容文件不可用于VCCI注册。制造商须加入VCCI，在认可实验室依据VCCI-CISPR 32 B类限值进行测试，并在标注VCCI标志前完成产品注册。未取得VCCI标志通常将无法进入日本主流零售和分销渠道。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] VCCI B類登錄是在日本銷售的消費類資訊技術設備的市場標準電磁相容要求。中國GB/T 9254測試報告及CCC電磁相容文件不可用於VCCI登錄。製造商須加入VCCI，在認可實驗室依據VCCI-CISPR 32 B類限值進行測試，並在標注VCCI標誌前完成產品登錄。未取得VCCI標誌通常將無法進入日本主流零售和分銷渠道。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — VCCI Class A Registration (Commercial / Industrial ITE) and User-Manual Warning
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——VCCI A类注册（商用/工业信息技术设备）及用户手册警告
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——VCCI A類登錄（商用/工業資訊技術設備）及使用者手冊警告

summary.en: VCCI Class A applies to ITE intended for use in commercial, industrial, or light-industrial environments (non-residential). Class A emission limits under VCCI-CISPR 32 are less stringent than Class B limits but carry an additional mandatory obligation: a VCCI Class A warning notice must be included in the user manual and, where practicable, on the device itself, stating that use in a residential environment may cause radio interference. Manufacturers or importers must join VCCI, register Class A products, and conduct testing to VCCI Class A technical requirements at an accredited laboratory. The VCCI Class A mark must be displayed. A Class A device may not be sold into residential retail channels without the Class B re-qualification.
summary.zh: VCCI A类适用于商用、工业或轻工业环境（非住宅）中使用的信息技术设备。VCCI-CISPR 32 A类辐射限值比B类宽松，但须履行额外的强制义务：须在用户手册中以及在设备上（如可行）附注VCCI A类警告说明，告知在住宅环境中使用可能引起无线电干扰。制造商或进口商须加入VCCI，完成A类产品注册，并在认可实验室依据VCCI A类技术要求进行测试。须标注VCCI A类标志。未经B类重新认证，A类设备不得进入住宅零售渠道销售。
summary.zht: VCCI A類適用於商用、工業或輕工業環境（非住宅）中使用的資訊技術設備。VCCI-CISPR 32 A類輻射限值比B類寬鬆，但須履行額外的強制義務：須在使用者手冊中以及在設備上（如可行）附注VCCI A類警告說明，告知在住宅環境中使用可能引起無線電干擾。製造商或進口商須加入VCCI，完成A類產品登錄，並在認可實驗室依據VCCI A類技術要求進行測試。須標注VCCI A類標誌。未經B類重新認證，A類設備不得進入住宅零售渠道銷售。

standards_or_laws: VCCI Technical Requirements for ITE — Class A emission limits (harmonised with CISPR 32 / VCCI-CISPR 32, Class A)
VCCI Council Rules — Class A user-manual and device warning notice requirement (VCCI, Japan)
CISPR 32:2015 (and amendments) — Class A emission limits for multimedia equipment used in commercial environments

summary.en: In China, Class A ITE (commercial/industrial) is subject to GB/T 9254 Class A emission limits, which are harmonised with CISPR 22 / CISPR 32 Class A limits. GB/T 9254 Class A also requires a user-warning notice in the product documentation stating the device is for commercial use and may cause interference in residential environments. CCC does not separately cover commercial-class ITE in all cases, but GB/T 9254 Class A testing is a market requirement. China GB/T 9254 Class A reports are not transferable to VCCI and do not satisfy Japan Class A registration obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，A类信息技术设备（商用/工业）须符合GB/T 9254 A类辐射限值，与CISPR 22/CISPR 32 A类限值协调一致。GB/T 9254 A类同样要求在产品文件中附注用户警告说明，告知该设备适用于商用环境，在住宅环境中可能造成干扰。CCC并不对所有商用类信息技术设备单独进行认证，但GB/T 9254 A类测试为市场要求。中国GB/T 9254 A类报告不可转用于VCCI，不满足日本A类注册义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，A類資訊技術設備（商用/工業）須符合GB/T 9254 A類輻射限值，與CISPR 22/CISPR 32 A類限值協調一致。GB/T 9254 A類同樣要求在產品文件中附注使用者警告說明，告知該設備適用於商用環境，在住宅環境中可能造成干擾。CCC並不對所有商用類資訊技術設備單獨進行認證，但GB/T 9254 A類測試為市場要求。中國GB/T 9254 A類報告不可轉用於VCCI，不滿足日本A類登錄義務。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 Class A — EMC emission limits for commercial/industrial ITE (harmonised with CISPR 22/32, China)
GB/T 9254 user-warning notice requirement for Class A devices sold in China

gap.en: China GB/T 9254 Class A documentation and CCC cannot be used for VCCI Class A registration in Japan. Separate VCCI membership, testing to VCCI-CISPR 32 Class A limits at a Japan-accredited laboratory, VCCI product registration, and inclusion of the mandatory VCCI Class A warning notice in the user manual are all required. A device registered under VCCI Class A cannot be sold in residential retail channels without separate Class B testing and re-registration. The Japanese VCCI Class A warning text differs from the Chinese GB/T 9254 warning notice text and is not interchangeable.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254 A类文件及CCC认证不可用于日本VCCI A类注册。须另行加入VCCI，在日本认可实验室依据VCCI-CISPR 32 A类限值进行测试，完成VCCI产品注册，并在用户手册中附注强制性VCCI A类警告说明。仅取得VCCI A类注册的设备，未经单独的B类测试和重新注册，不得在住宅零售渠道销售。日本VCCI A类警告文本与中国GB/T 9254警告说明文本不同，不可互换。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254 A類文件及CCC認證不可用於日本VCCI A類登錄。須另行加入VCCI，在日本認可實驗室依據VCCI-CISPR 32 A類限值進行測試，完成VCCI產品登錄，並在使用者手冊中附注強制性VCCI A類警告說明。僅取得VCCI A類登錄的設備，未經單獨的B類測試和重新登錄，不得在住宅零售渠道銷售。日本VCCI A類警告文本與中國GB/T 9254警告說明文本不同，不可互換。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary registration; market-standard requirement for commercial ITE sold in Japan — VCCI Class A mark and mandatory user-manual warning notice required in practice
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 Class A EMC conformity required for commercial ITE sold in China, including user-warning notice

source.publisher: Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment (VCCI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] VCCI Class A registration is the market-standard EMC path for commercial and industrial ITE sold in Japan. China GB/T 9254 Class A test reports cannot be submitted for VCCI registration. Manufacturers must join VCCI, test to VCCI-CISPR 32 Class A limits, register the product, and include the mandatory VCCI Class A warning notice in the user manual. Products intended for residential retail must undergo separate VCCI Class B registration rather than Class A.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] VCCI A类注册是在日本销售的商用和工业信息技术设备的市场标准电磁兼容路径。中国GB/T 9254 A类测试报告不可用于VCCI注册申请。制造商须加入VCCI，依据VCCI-CISPR 32 A类限值进行测试，完成产品注册，并在用户手册中附注强制性VCCI A类警告说明。面向住宅零售的产品须单独取得VCCI B类注册，而非A类。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] VCCI A類登錄是在日本銷售的商用和工業資訊技術設備的市場標準電磁相容路徑。中國GB/T 9254 A類測試報告不可用於VCCI登錄申請。製造商須加入VCCI，依據VCCI-CISPR 32 A類限值進行測試，完成產品登錄，並在使用者手冊中附注強制性VCCI A類警告說明。面向住宅零售的產品須單獨取得VCCI B類登錄，而非A類。
